name: inspectJvmRuntime
description: Collect a safe read-only JVM runtime snapshot for the given PID using jcmd/jstat only (no histogram, thread dump, or heap dump). 中文：对指定 pid 做轻量只读 JVM 快照，不采集直方图、线程栈或堆转储。 Example arguments JSON: {"pid": 12345}

pid.description: Target JVM process id (decimal); must match a pid from listJavaApps.
